parameters.content:
## One-time Setup (native nodes)

📎 **參考來源 / Source**: ported from [mihozip/google-workspace-admin-project-workflow](https://github.com/mihozip/google-workspace-admin-project-workflow) `src/Code.gs` @ `fce2513` (`setupAdminWorkflow`). See `PROVENANCE.md`.

Run this ONCE before activating any other workflow.

What it does (matches `setupAdminWorkflow` minus form creation):

1. Ensures these subfolders exist under your `ROOT_FOLDER_ID` (Google Drive nodes):
   - `01_公文專案啟動表`
   - `02_專案總控表`
   - `03_專案資料夾`
   - `04_專案階段日期新增表`
   - `06_Apps Script`
2. Creates `行政專案總控表` spreadsheet with sheets `行政專案總控表` and `專案階段日期紀錄` (Google Sheets node).
3. Appends header rows to both sheets (Google Sheets append).
4. Applies bold + light-blue formatting + frozen row to both header rows ⚠️ via HTTP `spreadsheets.batchUpdate`.
5. Moves the control sheet into `02_專案總控表` (Google Drive move).
6. Returns: `{ CONTROL_SHEET_ID, CONTROL_SHEET_URL, projectsParentFolderId }`.

Before running: fill the **Config** node with your `ROOT_FOLDER_ID`.

parameters.queryString: =name='{{ $json.folderName }}' and mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and '{{ $json.config.ROOT_FOLDER_ID }}' in parents and trashed=false

nodes.name: Write 階段紀錄 header row

parameters.jsCode:
const prep = $('Carry control sheet id').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...prep, ...prep.milestoneHeaderRow } }];

nodes.name: Feed 階段紀錄 header data

parameters.content:
### ⚠️ HTTP fallback — Sheets header bold + bg colour + frozen row

Needed because the native Google Sheets node has no operation for `repeatCell` (header formatting) or `updateSheetProperties` (frozen rows).

This call applies the standard light-blue bold header to BOTH sheets (`行政專案總控表` + `專案階段日期紀錄`) in one batchUpdate. Same fallback pattern as the project-starter core.

main.node: Feed 階段紀錄 header data
Write 階段紀錄 header row
